heroLead: Creative based in Munich — photography, videography, graphic design and AI-generated film. Editorials, brands and immersive visual worlds.
aboutText1: Creative based in Munich, focused on photography, videography, graphic design and AI-generated visuals.
aboutText2: Creating cinematic and aesthetic content — from editorials and visual concepts to flyers, logos and immersive AI films. Inspired by atmosphere, emotion, fashion, techno culture and futuristic aesthetics.
